Localization.Description: A user changed or failed to change attributes of a resource

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} failed to change attributes of the file "{object.fullpath}"
The user {subject.account.name} failed to change attributes of the directory "{object.fullpath}"
The user {subject.account.name} changed attributes of the directory "{object.fullpath}"
The user {subject.account.name} changed attributes of the file "{object.fullpath}"
